name: Barbecued Squid with Hot Dipping Sauce (Squid Sate)
recipeInstructions:
No country of origin, but I'm betting on Vietnam this time, mainly from the dip.
Prepare coconut milk by boiling 1 1/2 cups water and pouring it over 1 1/2 cups fresh or dry grated coconut. Beat in a blender or food processor for at least 1 minute, then strain through a sieve or cheesecloth. Marinate squid in this coconut milk with garlic for 1 hour.
Prepare the coals and skewer the squid.
To make the dipping sauce: combine fish sauce, peanuts, sugar, lime juice, and cayenne.
Grill squid for about 3 minutes on one side until brown. Flip and grill for another 3 minutes.
Serve with dipping sauce.
This dish serves 4 to 6 as part of a larger meal.
